title: ORGANIC REACTIONS WITH POLYPHOSPHORIC ACID. PART III. ONE-STEP ACYLATION AND ALKYLATION : cycoPENTENONES
author: SUKH DEV
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Polyphosphoric acid has been shown to be a useful reagent for the one-step synthesis of certain cyclic systems which had been prepared previously through several intermediate stagy. Possible mechanistic features of the reaction have been discussed.
steps_raw: Polyphosphoric acid has been shown to be a useful reagent for the one-step synthesis of certain cyclic systems which had been prepared previously through several intermediate stagy. Possible mechanistic features of the reaction have been discussed.
